# GitHub Labels

These are GitHub's built-in default labels. Do not create custom labels — use these.

| Label | Colour | When to use |
|-------|--------|-------------|
| `bug` | #d73a4a (red) | Something isn't working correctly |
| `documentation` | #0075ca (blue) | Improvements or additions to documentation |
| `duplicate` | #cfd3d7 (grey) | Issue or PR already exists |
| `enhancement` | #a2eeef (teal) | New feature or improvement request |
| `good first issue` | #7057ff (purple) | Good entry point for first-time contributors |
| `help wanted` | #008672 (green) | Extra attention or community help is needed |
| `invalid` | #e4e669 (yellow) | Issue or PR is off-topic, incorrect, or not reproducible |
| `question` | #d876e3 (pink) | Further information is requested |
| `wontfix` | #ffffff (white) | This will not be worked on |
